falsification_conditions.condition: S&P 500 closes below 4,800 on any day in the next 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: The 79% pattern match to bottom_2024_aug assumed a higher low structure; a break below 4,800 would violate the August bottom's support zone and invalidate the bottoming pattern thesis

falsification_conditions.condition: VIX closes above 25 for 3 consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A sustained VIX spike above 25 would indicate panic-driven selling rather than the controlled consolidation implied by a 39 blowoff score; this would contradict the 'HOLD' signal's assumption of low volatility continuation

falsification_conditions.condition: 10Y Treasury yield drops below 3.80% while S&P 500 also drops more than 2% from current levels
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This would signal a flight-to-safety recession scare, breaking the correlation structure of the August 2024 bottom when yields and equities stabilized together; the pattern match would fail if rates and stocks decouple into risk-off mode

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
